summary: Frontend-only regression of KOKI's Event landing page after (a) B&W theme conversion, (b) 3D→scroll-swipe hero reveal, (c) brand rename from Apex→KOKI. All 9 acceptance checks pass. No console errors, no WebGL canvas, no yellow anywhere, both hero PNGs load (HTTP 200), clip-path progressively swipes on scroll (0% → 92.3% → 100%), all sections render, quote form validates + succeeds, nav/hero buttons navigate correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Hero.jsx: scroll listener attaches once and unbinds correctly — good. Consider adding rAF throttling if scroll on low-end mobile stutters.
Landing.jsx is ~625 lines with several sub-components (Nav, Hero, Stats, Services, Work, About, Quote, Footer). Splitting into /components/* would improve maintainability but is not blocking.
Quote form intentionally client-only (sonner toast) per spec — noted, not a bug.
Global CSS scroll-behavior: 'smooth' means click-driven hash nav is animated; test used behavior:'instant' for sampling as instructed.

verification_evidence.title: KOKI's Event — Live Event Production & Rigging
verification_evidence.quote_filled_submit_toast: Quote request received — we'll be in touch.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Landing is single-page, purely client-side. Hero uses scroll-driven inline clipPath on [data-testid=hero-image-raw] over base [data-testid=hero-image-brand]. Both PNGs served from customer-assets.emergentagent.com (HTTP 200). Quote form is client-only (sonner). Global CSS has scroll-behavior:smooth — use behavior:'instant' when sampling scroll-driven inline styles.
